symbols.name: AnalysisContext
symbols.docstring: Everything fact extractors need to inspect a single function.

symbols.name: for_function
symbols.docstring:
Build a context for the function identified by `symbol_id`.

        Returns ContextError on resolution failure so the caller can decide
        how to surface it (e.g. as PurityResult(verdict=UNKNOWN)).

symbols.name: ContextError
symbols.docstring: Returned by AnalysisContext.for_function when context cannot be built.
